creator: joneum@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thx for the new Patch.

Can you please check this log: http://joneumbox.org/data/120amd64-ports/2019-05-06_13h01m08s/logs/i2p-0.9.39.log

[...]
 [javadoc] Building index for all the packages and classes...
  [javadoc] Building index for all classes...
  [javadoc] Generating /wrkdirs/usr/ports/security/i2p/work/i2p-0.9.39/build/javadoc/help-doc.html...
  [javadoc] 100 warnings

Are they relevant?
